Off Calendar Jul-29-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove Up.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Brenda Fields, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Matthew Wertheim, Esq. for Plaintiff Ross Dystra.
Witness:Ross Dystra was sworn and examined.
Plaintiff's Exhibits ----- ID/EV
Exh.1- Copy of Visa/Master Card Statement Showing payments made to contractor.
Exh.2- Xerox of Check paid to Acuna Industrial Hygine
Exh.3- Copy of Checks Paid to Pacific Dryawall
Exh.4- Conditional waiver and release upon final payment.
Exh.5- Copy of 2 checks payable to Duane Burke
Exh.6- Duane Burke's receipt for services
Exh.7- Home Depot Invoice for Merchandise
Exh.8- Copy of receipt re: fees paid to Court
Exh.9- Invoice for Rapid Serve
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Ross Dystra and against the defendant T. Reed Lagedrost Ind/dba Iagendrost Building Inspection Services as follows:
Damages of $51,968.68
Costs of $481.00
For the total of $52,449.68
Judgment signed in open court.
